titleStmt.title: SII 31.99: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 99. (A.R. No. B 306 of 1938.) BEḌUDŪRU, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Venkaṭēśvarasvāmi temple.
It is dated in the Śaka year 1471, Saumya, Chaitra, ba. 30, solar eclipse regularly corresponding to March 29, Friday, 1549 A.D.

It states that Purāntakas headed by Komaralingayya, Rachaya and others made the gift of the vīramushṭi tax of 3 māḍas per one year at the instance of Siddha-Bhikshavriti-Ayya and with the permission Chappanna dēśāla sakalapurātakulu (sakala purāntakulu of sixty four countries) to the temples of Virēśvara and Gavi-Rāmēśvara at Beḍadūru alias Narasiṁhapuram situated in Gaṇḍikōṭa sīma for the purpose of daily worship and monthly festivals. It is stated that this gift is offered for the merit of Rāchavīṭi Virēśvara and the several purāntakas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁga śa(śi)raścuṁbi caṁ
dracāmara cāravēttrelōkya nagarāraṁbha mū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti . śrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhasa śakavarṣambu
lu 1471 Agunēṭi saumyasaṁvatsara
caitra ba 30 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadā
si(śi)vadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu
vrajasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhuvi(padhivī) sāmrājya
ṁ śēyu cuṁḍagānu pṛdhiviki mūlastā(sdhā)na
mayina śrīgirimallikārju na dēvuni Ānati
ni svasti samastabhuvana praśasta sahitulayina
śrīmatu śidhabhikṣāpṛtti Ayyavāru mu
dalanu Oḍayala bhaktula sanmutini capanna
dēśāla sakalapurāṁtakulunu gaṁḍi kō
ṭaku cellē beḍadūriki pratināmamaina na
rasiṁhyapuraṁ Agrahāraṁ vīrēśvaruniga
virāmaya liṁgāni Amṛtapaḷakunnu
māsa mahātyavālakunnu dēvāpṛdhivi ma
hātuku puṇyaṁgānu sūryagrahaṇa pu
ṇyakālamaṁdu yīśvaruni saṁnidhini sidhava
ṭaṁ guṁṭivīraya kumāruḍu komārali
ṁga mānu kūṭagūḷa rācayānu karṇā
ṭaṁpale guṁṭi vīrayānu kājavīra
ya komāruḍu vīrayāsu vīrumoda
layina sakalapurāṁttakuluma dhārahō
siyicinadharma śāsanaṁ kramameṭlanasa

narasiṁhva
puraṁbaḍa
yalabhaktu
lu purāṁta
kulaku A
cukuvacce vī
ramuṣṭhi paṁ
nuyēṁḍu
1ki paga 3
Akṣarālā
mūḍu mā
ḷunu Iya
kaṭadasēśi(si)
sarasiṁha
puraṁ vīrē
śvaruni ga
vi rāmēśva
runi Amṛ
tapaḷakusu
māsa mahā
lsīvālakunu
rācavīṭi vī
rēśvaruniki
sakalapurā
ṁtakulaku
puṇyaṁgānu
dhāravōsi I
cina dharma śā
sanaṁ Ācaṁ
drārka stā(sdhā)I(yi)
gānu grāma
ṁlōnu mahā
janālunu
Oḍayala
bhaktulunu
naḍapagala
vāru .

yīdharmā naku yavaru tapi(ppi)
nānu śivadrōhi liṁgadrō
hi gurudrōhi yīgrāmāsa
purāṁtakulu vaci juṁju
kāśavēśinānu dēvaru dēśāla
kunu vibhūti rudrākṣukunu
tasi(ppi)navāru . Aniyicina dharma
śāsanaṁ [.] yīśāsanaṁ yicina
purāṁtakula Opaṁ (oppaṁ) rācavīṭi
vīrēśvaruṁḍu . śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
